column1: CITY GUIDE CROSS-REFERENCE MATRIX: Which Cities Link to Which Neighbors

When you publish a city guide, add cross-links to every neighbor marked with an X. Then go to each neighbor's guide and add a reciprocal link back. This ensures every guide strengthens its neighbors. An X means these cities should link to each other.

column2: These two cities are geographic neighbors and should cross-link in their city guides
Not adjacent. Do not force a cross-link unless a blog post naturally connects them (e.g., a comparison post)
